title: senecio jagensis
intro: Senecio jagensis, also known as the Devil's Bush, is a plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio jagensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
